issues: Annual price summary shows 'NaN/سنة' for some packages when price input is empty - minor display issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 tested new subscription packages (bronze, silver, gold). All APIs working correctly. Frontend UI shows new packages in tenant creation/edit dialogs. Prices modal displays all 5 packages with color-coded design. Notification settings default to 15 days before expiry with email notifications disabled. Subscriptions dashboard shows distribution and expected revenue.
